name: Crock Pot Lentil Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups dried lentils (1 cup brown lentils and 1 cup Masoor Dal)
2 cups Oriental Broth (Swanson's canned is great)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crock pot.
2. Stir to mix thoroughly.
3. Cover and cook on low for about 8 hours.
4. Serve with basmati rice and mango chutney.
